intentSynonyms: add a data query to an app in retool
description: Add a data query to a Retool app. The query connects to an existing resource (database, REST API, gRPC service) and can be referenced by widgets via {{ queryName.data }}. For SQL queries, provide the SQL string. For REST queries, provide httpMethod and query (URL path).

resource_name.description: Resource display name (e.g., "Billing Lifecycle (readonly / replica)") or internal UUID name

query_type.description: Query type: sql for databases, RESTQuery for REST APIs, grpc for gRPC services

query_string.description: The query: SQL statement, REST URL path, or gRPC method name

run_on_page_load.description: Whether to run when the page loads (default: false)

additional_properties.description: Extra query template properties (e.g., { httpMethod: "GET", body: "..." } for REST)
